issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in examples.
Assumes Node.js environment, not platform-agnostic for all AI agents.

scenarios.name: Subscription with license key for desktop app
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for Stripe and a hand-rolled license table; treatment used polar.products.create with a license_keys benefit, polar.checkouts.create, and polar.licenseKeys.validate/activate as documented.

scenarios.name: Securely handle subscription.canceled webhook
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used manual HMAC and an invented event name; treatment used validateEvent from @polar-sh/sdk/webhooks with the documented subscription.canceled type and customer.metadata.userId.
